# Goal

Implement the approved plan step-by-step.

---

# Instructions

- Follow plan strictly
- Use TypeScript or plan JavaScript depending on the existing codebase
- Use async/await
- Use zod validation
- Add error handling

---

# Output Format

## Step X: <name>

### Changes
- Files created/modified
